basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in PCM/ZBC/Home Science/ Community Science
qualification.details: Young Professional I: Graduate in PCM/ZBC/Home Science/ Community Science. Experience: Candidate should have working experience in the field of natural product chemistry. Candidate should be familiar with dye, pigments, flavonoids etc. Candidate should have working experience on natural dyes and their extraction. Candidate should be familiar with statistical data analysis tools.

salary_details.details: Young Professional I: Rs. 30,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GBPUAT Young Professional I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Young Professional I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Young Professional I post is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional I position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Young Professional I position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in PCM, ZBC, Home Science, or Community Science to be eligible for the Young Professional I position.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any specific experience required for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates should have working experience in natural product chemistry, familiarity with dyes, pigments, flavonoids, and experience in natural dye extraction and statistical data analysis tools.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the Principal Investigator's departmental address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Young Professional I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional I posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is CCS/ATS/160.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the GBPUAT located?
faq.answer: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology is located in Pantnagar, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 263145.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Young Professional I post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The interview for the Young Professional I posts is scheduled to be held on 22nd June 2026.
